raw.subject: Your Lawton page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're quite the community ambassadors through your Jimmy's Jerk Chicken events – I'm impressed by the variety of dishes you've been serving at Ft. Sill! 

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean some potential customers are missing out on learning about your services.

I sketched out a simple page idea that incorporates some of the photos and stories from your Facebook page, like an easy way for people to find your emergency call number, a service list, and even a map to see where you operate in Lawton.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/365-mobile-tire-service-lawton

If you're interested in making it easier for customers to find and reach you, I'd be happy to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses – just reply or give me a quick call to get started.
